_comment: readiness_threshold: overall weighted score needed to pass (0.0-1.0). category_threshold: minimum score for any single category (0.0-1.0). A document fails if ANY category falls below category_threshold, even if the overall score is above readiness_threshold.

categories.name: Structural Design & Optical Architecture
categories._comment: Highest weight — this is where the core novelty lives
reference_questions: Provide drawings (top view, cross-section, ray diagram) showing dual-edge light injection and overall light guide structure.
Explain the novel dot pattern and light extraction structure, including symmetry/complementary behaviour for dual-edge illumination.
Describe dot geometry (shape, size variation, depth, spacing) and whether dot size/density changes toward the centre.
How does dot geometry (shape, size variation, depth, spacing) affect light extraction, and does it change uniformity %?
Clarify whether the pattern is mathematically defined and provide the governing formula if any.

categories.name: Optical Optimisation & Mode Independence
reference_questions: Explain how dot density and distribution are optimized for dual-edge operation.
Describe how luminance uniformity is maintained when either source or both sources are active.
Identify simulation tools and design methodology used for optimization.

categories.name: Material, Fabrication & Performance
reference_questions: Specify material and thickness profile of the universal light guide.
Describe fabrication method used to realize the extraction pattern.
Provide measurable performance improvements (uniformity %, efficiency %, thickness reduction, scalability benefits) compared to standard LGP designs.
